zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen Kirton於大約1499年出生時，他的父親John Kirton27歲，母親Margaret White25歲。他於大約1523年與Margaret Offley在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1566年8月15日享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦比曉普斯蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen Kirton于大约1499年出生时，他的父亲John Kirton27岁，母亲Margaret White25岁。他于大约1523年与Margaret Offley在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1566年8月15日享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦比曉普斯蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Kirton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kirton (Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, Suffolk), or Kirton in Lindsey (Lincolnshire). The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ (probably replacing Old English cirice ‘church’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen Kirton was born about 1499, his father, John Kirton, was 27 and his mother, Margaret White, was 25. He married Margaret Offley about 1523, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 15 August 1566, at the age of 68, and was buried in Bishopsgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen Kirton(이)가 대략 1499년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Kirton(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret White(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1523년 영국에서 Margaret Offley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 8월 15일 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 비숍스가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen Kirton nasceu aproximadamente 1499, seu pai, John Kirton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret White, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Offley aproximadamente 1523, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1566, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishopsgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Giles Cripplegate, London, London, E: ст джилесь витоут крипплегэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen Kirton родился около 1499 г., его отцу по имени John Kirton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret White, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Offley около 1523 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 15 августа 1566 г. в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности бишопсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
